title: pyracantha coccinea var. pauciflora
intro: Pyracantha coccinea var. pauciflora is a lesser-known variety of the pyracantha shrub, characterized by its compact growth habit and reduced flowering compared to the more common Pyracantha coccinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pyracantha coccinea var. pauciflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
